title: Developer Portal
subtitle: Manage your API keys to access mudabbir services programmatically

errors.nameRequired: Please enter a name for the API key
errors.serviceNameRequired: Please enter a name for the service key

apiKeys.title: API Keys
apiKeys.description: Create and manage API keys for your organization

serviceKeys.title: Dograh Service Keys
serviceKeys.description: Manage service keys for accessing Dograh AI services (LLM, TTS, STT)

securityNotice: Keep your API keys secure. Never share them publicly or commit them to version control. API keys provide full access to your organization's resources.

createApiKeyDialog.title: Create New API Key
createApiKeyDialog.description: Enter a descriptive name for your API key to help you identify it later.

createdKeyDialog.title: API Key Created Successfully
createdKeyDialog.description: Make sure to copy your API key now. You won't be able to see it again!
createdKeyDialog.storeNotice: Store this key securely. It will only be shown once and cannot be retrieved later.

createServiceKeyDialog.title: Create New Service Key
createServiceKeyDialog.description: Create a service key to access Dograh AI services (LLM, TTS, STT)
createServiceKeyDialog.namePlaceholder: e.g., Production AI Services, Development LLM Access

createdServiceKeyDialog.title: Service Key Created Successfully
createdServiceKeyDialog.description: Make sure to copy your service key now. You won't be able to see it again!
createdServiceKeyDialog.accessNotice: This key provides access to Dograh AI services including LLM, Text-to-Speech, and Speech-to-Text.
createdServiceKeyDialog.storeNotice: Store this key securely. It will only be shown once and cannot be retrieved later.
